inputs.label: Direct Water Use
inputs.businessContext: Annual direct water consumption from taps, irrigation, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual direct water consumption from taps, irrigation, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Musluk, sulama vb. yıllık doğrudan su tüketimi
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher direkter Wasserverbrauch aus Wasserhähnen, Bewässerung usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation annuelle directe d'eau (robinets, irrigation, etc.)

inputs.label: Food Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual food consumption, average water footprint per kg is 2.5 m³/kg (global average)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual food consumption, average water footprint per kg is 2.5 m³/kg (global average)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık gıda tüketimi, kg başına ortalama su ayak izi 2,5 m³/kg (küresel ortalama)
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Lebensmittelverbrauch, durchschnittlicher Wasserfußabdruck pro kg beträgt 2,5 m³/kg (globaler Durchschnitt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation annuelle de nourriture, empreinte hydrique moyenne de 2,5 m³/kg (moyenne mondiale)

inputs.label: Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual electricity use, water footprint approx 0.01 m³/kWh (cooling, hydropower)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual electricity use, water footprint approx 0.01 m³/kWh (cooling, hydropower)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık elektrik kullanımı, su ayak izi yaklaşık 0,01 m³/kWh (soğutma, hidroelektrik)
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Stromverbrauch, Wasserfußabdruck ca. 0,01 m³/kWh (Kühlung, Wasserkraft)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation annuelle d'électricité, empreinte hydrique d'environ 0,01 m³/kWh (refroidissement, hydroélectricité)

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual fuel use (petrol/diesel), water footprint approx 0.02 m³/L (extraction, refining)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual fuel use (petrol/diesel), water footprint approx 0.02 m³/L (extraction, refining)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık yakıt kullanımı (benzin/mazot), su ayak izi yaklaşık 0,02 m³/L (çıkarma, rafinaj)
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Kraftstoffverbrauch (Benzin/Diesel), Wasserfußabdruck ca. 0,02 m³/L (Förderung, Raffination)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation annuelle de carburant (essence/diesel), empreinte hydrique d'environ 0,02 m³/L (extraction, raffinage)

inputs.label: Wastewater Discharge
inputs.businessContext: Annual wastewater volume requiring treatment, equivalent grey water footprint

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual wastewater volume requiring treatment, equivalent grey water footprint
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arıtma gerektiren yıllık atık su hacmi, eşdeğer gri su ayak izi
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Abwasservolumen, das behandelt werden muss, entspricht grauem Wasserfußabdruck
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume annuel d'eaux usées nécessitant un traitement, équivalent à l'empreinte eau grise

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
